subcategory: siri-style animated orb with blur and glow effects
use_cases: Hero section background decoration with animated visual interest
AI assistant interface indicator with customizable glowing orb
Loading state visual with dynamic color animation
Decorative background element for modern SaaS landing pages
Voice or chat interface visual indicator with Siri-like appearance
ai_summary: A Siri-style animated orb component featuring customizable colors, size, and animation duration. The orb uses CSS blur and contrast filters to create a glowing, 3D-like appearance with layered color gradients in oklch color space. Designed as a decorative visual element for AI interfaces, hero sections, or as an animated background component.
